mapper.select: select count(0) dataCount from SYNLTE.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD'
select count(0) from standardize_object o1 inner join standardize_outputobject o2 on o1.obj_guid = o2.obj_guid where DATE_FORMAT(o1.insert_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d')
select count(0) dataCount from SYNLTE.SYNLTEFIELD
select count(0) dataCount from SYNLTE.SAMEWORD
select count(0) dataCount from SYNLTE.FIELDCODE
mapper.insert: insert into DGN_DATA_LARGE_SCREEN(module_id, module_name, data_info, create_time) values (#{moduleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataInfo,jdbcType=CLOB}, CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAY)
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(errorNumber), 0) errorNumber, ifnull(sum(governanceFinish), 0) finishedNumber from DQC_HistoryExceptionTrack where create_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}

SELECT SERVICE_IP AS dataName, count(distinct RESOURCE_ID) AS typeCount, ifnull(round(sum(DATA_COUNT)/100000000, 2), 0) AS dataCount FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE DATE_FORMAT(DATA_SEND_TIME,'%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE,'%Y%m%d') GROUP BY SERVICE_IP;

SELECT v.CODEID AS dataId, v.CODETEXT AS dataName, IFNULL(ROUND(t.dataCount / 100000000, 2), 0) AS dataCount, IFNULL(v.tablecount, 0) AS typeCount FROM ( SELECT * FROM v_classify_info l LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT SJXJBM) AS tableCount FROM classify_interface_all_date GROUP BY PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH ) r ON l.codeText = r.name WHERE l.parcodeid = #{sjzzflCodeId} ) v LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH AS primaryClassifyCh, SUM(table_all_count) AS dataCount, COUNT(DISTINCT table_name_en) AS typeCount FROM ( SELECT j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, j.table_all_count, j.table_name_en, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY LOWER(TABLE_PROJECT), UPPER(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j WHERE j.STATISTICS_TIME >= date(NOW()) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 GROUP BY h.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH ) t ON t.primaryClassifyCh COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = v.CODETEXT COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

WITH RECURSIVE classify_tree AS ( SELECT CODEID, CODETEXT, PARCODEID, 1 AS level FROM v_classify_info WHERE CODEID = #{sjzzflCodeId} UNION ALL SELECT c.CODEID, c.CODETEXT, c.PARCODEID, ct.level + 1 AS level FROM classify_tree ct JOIN v_classify_info c ON ct.CODEID = c.PARCODEID AND ct.level < 3 -- 控制层级深度不超过3层 ) SELECT v.CODEID AS dataId, v.CODETEXT AS dataName, IFNULL(ROUND(t.tableAllSum / 1e8, 2), 0) AS dataCount, IFNULL(t.tableNumberSum, 0) AS typeCount, IFNULL(ROUND(t.yesterdayAllSum / 1e8, 2), 0) AS todayUpdateCount FROM classify_tree v LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH AS primaryClassifyCh, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH AS secondaryClassifyCh, SUM(table_all_count) AS tableAllSum, COUNT(DISTINCT table_name_en) AS tableNumberSum, SUM(YESTERDAY_COUNT) AS yesterdayAllSum FROM ( SELECT PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, table_all_count, table_name_en, YESTERDAY_COUNT FROM ( SELECT j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, j.table_all_count, j.table_name_en, j.YESTERDAY_COUNT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LOWER(TABLE_PROJECT), UPPER(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j WHERE STATISTICS_TIME >= date(NOW()) AND rnn = 1 -- 只取最新记录行（与Oracle的h.rnn=1等效） ) h ) g GROUP BY PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH ) t ON t.secondaryClassifyCh = v.CODETEXT WHERE v.level = 3
AND v.PARCODEID = #{dataId}

select r.nodeinstanceid nodeInstanceId, DATE_FORMAT(r.endtime,'%Y-%m-%d') as dataTime, r.statisticstr statisticStr, j.extrainfostr extraInfoStr, s.jobdataxjson jobDataxJson from jobexecuterecord r left join job j on r.jobid = j.id left join subjob s on s.jobid=j.id where r.status = 1 and r.endtime between #{startTime} and #{endTime}

select resource_id as sourceId, data_count as dataCount, service_ip as nodeInstanceId, DATE_FORMAT(data_arrive_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as dataTime from DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL where data_arrive_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}

SELECT days.dataTime, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(m.dataCount), 0) / 100000000, 2) AS dataCount FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE date_seq AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AS dataTime UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(dataTime, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM date_seq WHERE dataTime < CURRENT_DATE() ) SELECT dataTime FROM date_seq ) days LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(data_send_time) AS dataTime, IFNULL(data_count, 0) AS dataCount FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL ) m ON days.dataTime = m.dataTime GROUP BY days.dataTime ORDER BY days.dataTime;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT RESOURCE_ID) AS typeCount, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(DATA_COUNT) / 1e8, 2), 0) AS dataCount FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE DATA_ARRIVE_TIME BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime};

SELECT days.dataTime, IFNULL(SUM(m.dataCount), 0) AS dataCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL (7 - seq.seq) DAY) AS dataTime FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 ) AS seq ) AS days LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(data_arrive_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dataTime, COALESCE(data_count, 0) AS dataCount FROM DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL ) AS m ON days.dataTime = m.dataTime GROUP BY days.dataTime ORDER BY days.dataTime;

SELECT days.dataTime, m.sourceId FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL (2 - seq.seq) DAY) AS dataTime FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 ) AS seq ) AS days LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(data_arrive_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dataTime, resource_id AS sourceId FROM DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL ) AS m ON days.dataTime = m.dataTime GROUP BY days.dataTime, m.sourceId ORDER BY days.dataTime;

SELECT service_ip AS nodeInstanceId, resource_id AS sourceId, SUM(COALESCE(data_count, 0)) AS dataCount FROM DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE data_arrive_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY service_ip, resource_id;
